economic_notes: First Nation operates Red Sucker Lake Air Services Ltd. and 6173536 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a RSL Inc.). Gaming revenue from video lottery terminals through Manitoba Liquor and Lotteries Corporation. Tobacco and fuel tax rebates from Province of Manitoba.
notes: Auditor issued a Disclaimer of Opinion due to significant weaknesses in internal controls across multiple areas including cash, accounts receivable, prepaid expenses, investments, tangible capital assets, construction in progress, accounts payable, long-term debt, revenue/deferred revenue, expenditures, payroll, and capital projects. The audit was signed May 30, 2023 — approximately 3 years after fiscal year end, indicating severely delayed reporting. The entity 6173536 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a RSL Inc.) was inaccessible during audit. Construction in progress of $3,525,000 relates to Health Centre/Nursing Station and School Capital Planning unchanged from prior year. Consolidated entity includes Red Sucker Lake CMHC Housing Authority, Red Sucker Lake Health Authority Inc., Red Sucker Lake Employment and Training, 6173536 Manitoba Ltd. (o/a RSL Inc.), and Red Sucker Lake Air Services Ltd. No schedule of remuneration disclosed.
